name: Wilted Spinach Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach and discard the stems. Pat it dry on paper towels.
2. Tear the spinach into a bowl.
3. Add the green onion and sprinkle with pepper.
4. At serving time, fry the bacon until crisp but not drained.
5. Add vinegar, lemon juice, sugar, and salt to the hot bacon.
6. Gradually add the spinach, tossing until wilted and leaves are coated.
7. Sprinkle with the chopped hard-boiled egg.
